horoscopes.title: Aries Weekly Horoscope Starting March 15
content: The third week of March will have three main transits, they are Pisces new moon, Mercury direct in Pisces and the Sun moving into Pisces. The new moon in your twelfth house will bring significant events in your life, as you will feel the need of privacy, rest and restoration. The new moon indicates new beginnings, so you will try to complete some tasks, so that you can start a new one. Some of you will visit hospitals for yourself or someone else, but this is not a major event, as the events in the transit is temporary. You will also clear out storage areas, find out some secrets, old files, or you will go for healing practices.

Mercury will turn direct in the twelfth house on the twentieth, so the communication issues that happened earlier will start improving. You will get replies to the messages, emails or applications that were delated before. Paperwork connected to institutions, travel, or official matters will start or move smoothly. You will have good dreams, and they will show you the signals about the future. This retrograde also brought some blocks in the work, but from this week they will start diminishing. This is also a very good time for taking part in competitive items.

The Sun will move into the first house on twentieth, and Venus is also there, so you will be more visible in the society. You will buy new clothes, change your hairstyle, or update your public profile or photos. People will notice your presence more, and you will receive direct compliments or attention in social settings. The Sun- Venus duo will bring gatherings, meetings, or small celebrations where you asked to speak or introduce ideas. Your physical energy will increase, and you will start a fitness regimen, walk more, or become more active in daily activities.

horoscopes.title: Taurus Weekly Horoscope Starting March 15
content: For Taurus Sun, Moon and rising sign natives will have a lot of social activity, private planning, and personal preparation during this week. The New moon, Mars and Mercury will impact the eleventh house, so there will be a lot of communication online or offline, and you will get a new friend. You will attend meetings, join group sessions, or participate in community events. Friends and team mates will invite you to gatherings, celebrations or team activities. Mars will make these events bust, and energetic, but there are chances for arguments too. You will also get a new job, or you will start a new investment plan, which can give you a long term income.

Mercury will start its direct mode in twentieth, so you will be more peaceful, as you will see the blocks which you faced in the last two weeks getting removed. The communication issues that occurred earlier with friends or coworkers will start improving. If some of your messages were ignored or delayed will finally receive the replied. Group projects that were paused will start moving forward. You will also reconnect with an old friend or former colleague who contacts you about restarting a plan or collaboration.

The Sun will move into the twelfth house, and Venus is already there, and that will make you spend time for rest and restoration. You may take day off, rest at home, or visit peaceful locations, such as temples, beaches, or wellness centres. There are chances for visit hospital for yourself or for some others, but this is not a very serious issue. You may also spend money on personal care, travel booking, or private services. This transit can bring emotional issues, as the Sun in the twelfth house will highlight the emotional issues. Please stay away from all kinds of scandals and focus on your growth.

horoscopes.title: Gemini Weekly Horoscope Starting March 15
content: For Gemini Sun, Moon and rising signs the career sector will be highlighted due to the new moon in Pisces, and Mars and Mercury conjunction. The new moon indicates new beginnings, so there will be new job opportunities coming up in the next six months, so you need to use this time wisely. You will attend meetings with managers, supervisors, or clients where you discuss the scope of new projects. You will submit reports, attend interviews, or you may even get a new work device. This is a sensitive time, so make sure you don’t rebel at your workplace. Those who work in admin, armed forces, media, and healthcare will have new projects.

The transit Mercury will end its retrograde this week, so, but it will take until twentieth, so make sure you are careful with your electronic devices. This retrogression is taking place in the tenth house, so there are chances for you to get fake job offers or interview calls. There will be communication issues, but they will get corrected as you reach the weekend. By next week onwards, your emails will get proper replies, and your managers also will give good review for your work. However, until weekend, the retrogression will impact you, so you have to be careful.

The Sun will move into its exaltation sign Aries during this week, and Venus is already there, and this is a very promising transit for your long term plans and collaborative efforts. You will be spending more time with team mates, and friends, discussing the possibility of long term projects which will bring some profits. The Venus part shows the chances for working majorly in the team with people from opposite gender, so this is a good time for single natives to find likeminded people. You may also get new friends, new team ventures, and appreciation for your work.

horoscopes.title: Cancer Weekly Horoscope Starting March 15
content: The Cancer Sun, Moon and rising signs will have a keen interest in higher studies, and spiritual matters as the new moon will rise in the ninth house. This is the time to go for long distance travel, but there will be some blocks too. The impact of the new moon will last for the next six months, so you will have a long-time frame to have such plans. You will also get chances to book tickets, visa processing, university applications, or training programs. Some of you will also register for courses, attend orientation sessions, or speak with teachers and advisors about study plans. This is also a time to get writing assignments and publish your work.

Mercury, the planet for communication and media is in retrogression and it will turn direct on the twentieth, which is a very good news, but until then you will have technical glitches and communication problems. You will have to cross check your travel booking, university applications or visa processing. There will be the need of resending the emails to universities, trainers, or you will have to cross check the track of the travel agency which manage your travel bookings. However, this is a very good time for students who is appearing for their back papers.

The Sun will move into Aries and Venus is also there, and the Sun will be in its exaltation sign for the next thirty days, and this will impact your tenth house of career. This Sun will bring new job opportunities, especially if you are working in creative or admin sector. The Sun is light, and it will show the need to review your work, and your managers will be keen to know the quality of your work. Job seekers will find new opportunities, but they have to prepare well.

horoscopes.title: Leo Weekly Horoscope Starting March 15
content: The third week of March will witness the new moon in the eighth house of investments, finances, and shared resources. The eighth house the Sun, Mars and Mercury too, so there will be a lot of focus on financial matters, so there will be opportunities to visit banks, meeting with financial consultant, or you will discuss the possibility of loans. The impact of the new moon will last for the next six months, so you will look at the possibility of repayment, and restructuring your tax and insurance related plans too. If you are going through relationship issues, you may even “call it quits” in the next six months or reconcile.

Mercury is in retrogression, and it will turn direct on twentieth, and that will bring communication issues, and technical glitches this week too. Since this retrogression is taking place in the eighth house, you have to be very careful with the financial matters, as you may be careless in handling them. Sudden expenses will be the main theme of this week, and you need to be prepared for that. Bank officials, or institutions will ask for additional documents, which is very much required for the approval, but you have to cross check them before submission.

The solar transit will enter the fire sign Aries this week, and Venus is also there, and this will activate your ninth house, which will bring the chances for long distance travel, and foreign collaborations. This Sun will bring mentors, fatherly figures and gurus into your life, and there are chances for learning from them through conflicts. You will also question your belief systems, and try to go for spiritual practices, which you never tried before. There will be programs like cultural exchange, global ventures, and learn from your foreign counterparts. There will be opportunities for learning new courses, writing and publish your articles.

horoscopes.title: Virgo Weekly Horoscope Starting March 15
content: The third week of March will witness transit new moon in Pisces, and the Sun transit in the eighth house. This week will begin with the new moon in the seventh house of personal and professional relationships. The new moon indicates the seventh house indicates new relationships, but the Sun, Mars, and Mercury is there, so you will have to be careful with whom you meet. You will attend meetings, to discuss the possibility of new collaborations, but please wait until next month to start such projects. You will also attend social gatherings where you meet new people, but kindly don’t overshare anything about yourself.

Mercury will be retrograde until the twentieth, and until then you will have technical issues and communication problems. You will meet your old friends, partners or ex-lovers, but make sure you don’t restart any new project with them without a second thought. If you are going to sign any document you need to read the instructions again, or resend the documents if someone misunderstands details. Meetings will get rescheduled due to the technical glitches, or misunderstandings. Mercury will aspect the first house so you may also get worried for no reason, but this situation will diminish after this week.

The Sun will move into Aries and it will be there for the next thirty days and this will impact your eighth house of financial matters, which is not a good transit, so please be careful with your finances. You will go to banks, speak with financial consultants, or review loan, insurance, or tax documents. Payment related to joint accounts or shared household expenses should be handled carefully, as there are chances for sudden expenditure. Some of you will receive some money through support, reimbursements, settlements, or partner contributions. This is also good time for healing your emotional wounds, so you will go for such therapies.

horoscopes.title: Libra Weekly Horoscope Starting March 15
content: The new moon will rise in Pisces, which will impact your sixth house, and that will bring new projects at workplace. You will also think about new strategies to apply in the new projects, but you will need the support of your colleagues. The new moon indicates new beginnings, so job seekers will have the closest opportunities for a new job in the next six months. Some of you will attend workshops, or orientation meetings connected to their job. The sixth house also indicates health, so you will start a new health routine like scheduling a medical checkup, starting new diet or workout programs.

Mercury is retrograding through the sixth house, so it will slow down the work processes, so you should be ready for repeated attempts. You should cross check the project details, as there are huge chances for errors. The colleagues and managers will give you additional instructions, so you may have to redo some tasks. There will be sudden change in the work location, so you will have to handle sudden requests from the backend too. Please try to stay away from all kind of unhealthy talks at work, as they can hamper the work quality.

The Sun will enter its exaltation sign Aries, and it will conjunct Venus, and that will impact the 7th house of personal and business relationship. Both the planets are not great in the seventh house, so you will have to be careful with the partners from personal and professional sector. You will attend meetings with clients, business partners, or close collaborators to form new business ventures. The seventh house also indicates new role, so there are chances to get a new role in the existing job during this time. There will be social gatherings, and you will meet new people during this week. Long trips, and some arguments are also possible during this week.

horoscopes.title: Scorpio Weekly Horoscope Starting March 15
content: For Scorpio, the week will begin with new moon in your fifth house, so there will be a lot of activity in romance, hobbies, and with your children. The fifth house indicates center stage, so you will be visible in the public, and you will also be noticed for your creative ventures. This is the week to attend social gatherings, entertainment events, or hobby-related activities like sports, music, or creative workshops. This is the closest time for single Scorpio to go for dates, but make sure you are not hurry in taking or giving commitments. Parents will actively participate in their children’s life too.

Mercury will be retrograde until twentieth, so you have to be careful with your communications, as Mercury retrograde can bring technical glitches and communication problems. If you want to invest in a business, then there are challenges, and avoid any kind of risky investments, otherwise there will be losses. You may also meet your ex-lover or old friends, but you have to rethink your strategies if you want to take them back into your life. Parents have to be very careful with the assignments of children, as the children will have difficulties in their projects. Until twentieth, moms-to-be also will have to be careful with their health.

The solar transit will enter its exaltation sign Aries, and Venus will conjunct the Sun, both the planets are not good or bad in the sixth house. You will have significant events at workplace like meetings, job search and competitive exams. The Sun and Venus will bring arguments at work, so please stay away from unhealthy talks at work. The lower abdomen area will be very sensitive, and you should avoid any kind of junk diet. You will spend money for medical checkups, wellness products or gym memberships. You may also look for new job opportunities, which is very much possible in the next thirty plus days.

horoscopes.title: Sagittarius Weekly Horoscope Starting March 15
content: For Sagittarius Sun, Moon and rising will focus on the family matters as the new moon will rise in the water sign of Pisces. The new moon indicates new beginnings, and the impact of the new moon will last for the next six months, so in the next six months, there will be new real estate deals, or you will go for relocation. Some of you will buy household items, like kitchen supplies, furniture, or repair tools. There will be family gatherings, or you may travel to meet with your friends and relatives. Please try to pick the right real estate agency to work for you, otherwise there will be blocks.

Mercury will be retrograding in the fourth house, that shows some disputes at home, so make sure you try to keep peace with all the family members. Maintenance workers or service appointments for repairs may get delayed due to the technical glitches. There will be some errors in the property paper works, rental agreements, or household bills, so you need to cross check them. Mercury will aspect the tenth house, so there will be some blocks at work as well. There will be repetitive work, and technical glitches too, which need to be taken care of.

The Sun will enter the fire sign of Aries and Venus is also here, so you will have some creative projects, but make sure you are not investing in huge projects. You will also attend entertainment events, go out for dinners, or spend time with friends and youngsters. Single Sagittarius Sun, Moon and rising natives will have the closest opportunities to find someone special. You will have team meetings, and it can be online or offline, so but make sure these projects are realistic. Parents will spend more time with children, and they will have serious conversation with the teachers.

horoscopes.title: Capricorn Weekly Horoscope Starting March 15
content: The third week of March will bring changes in the third house, and you will be busier especially after the twentieth. The new moon will rise in the water sign of Pisces, so, you will have a lot of projects, which are very short in nature. There will be multiple short travels for personal and professional purposes, so get ready for that, as they will be expensive as well. You will spend more time in online and offline discussions, sending emails, or attending some conferences. The third house indicates studies, writing and publishing, so you will spend time in these matters as well.

The neck to hand area will be sensitive, and you will have to be careful with your health. Since Mercury is retrograding in the third house, so there will be delays and technical glitched. You need to cross check the communications, as there will be some errors, so cross check all the projects before final submission. You will have some corrections in the documents, and travel schedules need to be rechecked. Meetings may be postponed, or rescheduled, so, you need to adjust with the daily plans. Due to the Mercury retrogression, you may meet with your old friends, or a relative after a long time.

The Sun will move into Aries and Venus is also there, so you will spend more time at home, as the fourth house will be activated for the next thirty days. You will feel the need to clean your home, rearrange the furniture, or buy household items, such as kitchen tools, decor, or appliances. There will be family gatherings, or family or friends will visit your home. There will be repairing works like plumbing, painting or electric works. The Sun and Venus will aspect the tenth house of career, so there will be new projects too.

horoscopes.title: Aquarius Weekly Horoscope Starting March 15
content: The Aquarius Sun, Moon and rising sign natives will have to focus on their financial matters as the new moon will rise in Pisces, which rules the second house. Not only the Moon other planets are also there, so for the last few weeks, you were having financial issues, and it will continue for the next six months. You will check bank balance, organize financial records, or plan how to manage the upcoming expenses. The second house indicates upskilling, so professionals will plan to upskill, and there will be some opportunities for a new job. The facial area will need more care.

Mercury is retrograding in the second house, so this is not the right time to start any new investment plans. You will have to be careful with the receipts, verify online transfers, or confirm payment details before completing the purchase. During this time, fraudsters can come to you with wrong financial schemes like money chain, so make sure you don’t fall into such traps. The second house indicates speech, and you may use bad language, which will trigger others. Please be silent during sensitive times, otherwise you will pick up battles where you lose for sure. Those who have family business, should not take solo decisions.

The Sun will enter Aries, and it will be conjuncting Venus in the third house, so there will be a lot of meetings, and you will have to multitask. You will make phone calls, send messages or you will have online or offline meetings. You will have online or offline shopping or you will sell in these modes. This transit will bring more communication with siblings, neighbors, or coworkers about your daily life. You may also buy electronic gadgets, books or repair the electronic gadgets. The transit will bring learning sessions, and writing related projects.

horoscopes.title: Pisces Weekly Horoscope Starting March 15
content: This is a special week for Pisces Sun, Moon and rising signs as the new moon will rise in your sign, so there will be a lot of personal activity. The new moon indicates new beginnings, and the impact of the new moon will last for the next six months. So, prepare yourself to receive new relationship, job offers or business ideas in the next six months. At the same time Moon is conjunct with Mars, and it can make you a bit restless, and that shows you have to take care of your health as well. You will also try to have a makeover, and you will also buy new costumes.

Mercury will turn direct in the first house, and that will create misunderstandings, technical glitches, or travel blocks. You will meet your old friends, coworkers, or family members but there will be some confusion and arguments with them. This is not the right time start new relationship, but you can review your relationship. If you are going through a relationship issue then this is not the time to take final decision. Please wait until Mercury goes direct, otherwise there will be long term damages. Please don’t start any new business ventures now, for that also you wait until Mercury goes direct.

The Sun will move into its exaltation sign Aries, and Venus is also there, so your second house of finances will be very important. You will pay bills, buy groceries, or purchase personal items such as clothing, cosmetics, or small electronics. The second house also indicates new job, so there are chances to get a job, contract project or a freelance project too. You will review new investment plans, but this is not the time to start a new investment as the Sun Venus combination is not good for savings.
